response.justification: Candidate is a web/full-stack engineer with deep expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js, but lacks the core requirements for this role. C++ experience is limited to roughly 6 months at National Instruments (2014-2015) plus a bachelor thesis project — far below the 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows required. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience, no Windows platform specialization, and no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains. The mismatch on mandatory technical and domain criteria is severe.
strengths: Strong overall software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development
Polyglot programmer with exposure to many languages including Java and some C/C++
Long track record of building and shipping production systems across multiple domains
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, from over a decade ago, and not on a Windows-focused role
No experience with SQL Server or Oracle; database background is MongoDB and MySQL
Zero exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains

key_factors.factor: No financial services / capital markets domain
